title: Recurring Cost Calculator (RCA)
description: Industrial-grade recurring cost analysis tool based on Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO 14000 standards. Calculates total recurring cost, identifies hidden loss drivers, and suggests improvement actions.

inputs.label: Labor Rate (per hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage including burden for direct labor operators.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra (por hora)

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly wage including burden for direct labor operators.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Direkt işçilik operatörleri için yan haklar dahil ortalama saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Stundenlohn inkl. Lohnnebenkosten für direktes Personal.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire moyen charges comprises pour les opérateurs de production directe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario medio por hora incluyendo cargas sociales para operadores de mano de obra directa.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Standard time per production cycle (e.g., per unit or batch).

label_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra por ciclo

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard time per production cycle (e.g., per unit or batch).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim çevrimi başına standart süre (örneğin birim veya parti başına).
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardzeit pro Produktionszyklus (z. B. pro Einheit oder Charge).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps standard par cycle de production (par exemple, par unité ou par lot).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo estándar por ciclo de producción (ej., por unidad o lote).

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit of output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per unit of output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı birimi başına direkt malzeme maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des matières directes par unité produite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de material directo por unidad de producción.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Electricity, gas, or other energy costs per production cycle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Electricity, gas, or other energy costs per production cycle.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim çevrimi başına elektrik, gaz veya diğer enerji maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Strom-, Gas- oder andere Energiekosten pro Produktionszyklus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts d'électricité, de gaz ou autres coûts énergétiques par cycle de production.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos de electricidad, gas u otros energéticos por ciclo de producción.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost per Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Average preventive and corrective maintenance cost allocated per cycle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average preventive and corrective maintenance cost allocated per cycle.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çevrim başına tahsis edilen ortalama önleyici ve düzeltici bakım maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche vorbeugende und korrigierende Instandhaltungskosten pro Zyklus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen de maintenance préventive et corrective alloué par cycle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio de mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo asignado por ciclo.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover indirect expenses (ISO 14051).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage applied to direct costs to cover indirect expenses (ISO 14051).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dolaylı giderleri karşılamak için direkt maliyetlere uygulanan yüzde (ISO 14051).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der auf direkte Kosten angewendet wird, um indirekte Kosten abzudecken (ISO 14051).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage appliqué aux coûts directs pour couvrir les dépenses indirectes (ISO 14051).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje aplicado a los costos directos para cubrir gastos indirectos (ISO 14051).

inputs.label: Cycle Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Actual cycle time per unit; used for throughput and efficiency calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual cycle time per unit; used for throughput and efficiency calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim başına gerçek çevrim süresi; verim ve üretkenlik hesaplamalarında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche Zykluszeit pro Einheit; wird für Durchsatz- und Effizienzberechnungen verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de cycle réel par unité ; utilisé pour les calculs de débit et d'efficacité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de ciclo real por unidad; utilizado para cálculos de rendimiento y eficiencia.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units that fail quality inspection (Six Sigma metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units that fail quality inspection (Six Sigma metric).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite denetiminde başarısız olan birimlerin yüzdesi (Altı Sigma metriği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Einheiten, die die Qualitätsprüfung nicht bestehen (Six Sigma-Kennzahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'unités qui échouent au contrôle qualité (métrique Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de unidades que fallan la inspección de calidad (métrica Seis Sigma).

rules.message: Cycle time and labor hours must be positive.
Defect rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Shift pattern must be one of: single, double, continuous.

thresholds.message: Labor cost per cycle exceeds $50. Consider process improvement (Lean).
Defect rate above 5% — Six Sigma DMAIC project recommended.
Energy cost per cycle > $10. Investigate energy efficiency (ISO 50001).
Overhead rate > 50%. Review indirect cost drivers (ABC analysis).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
